expectations.text: Uses Pydantic at the pipeline entry point and for external API responses
expectations.evidence: CleanedRecord (line 36) and EnrichedRecord (line 68) are Pydantic BaseModels with strict/frozen/forbid at stage boundaries

expectations.text: Uses dataclass or plain objects for internal flow, OR explains the tradeoff
expectations.evidence: Docstring line 8: 'Internal helpers use plain dataclasses'. Stage functions are plain Python — Pydantic only at stage exits.

expectations.text: Does NOT add Pydantic validation at every internal handoff
expectations.evidence: Stage functions construct Pydantic models at exit only. No re-validation between stages.
